scenarios.name: User logs in and reaches the dashboard
scenarios.maps_to_requirement: Role-based login routes to the correct dashboard
steps: Fill the login form with valid developer credentials and submit
Wait for the developer dashboard to render
scenarios.given: The deployed app is live at base_url
scenarios.when: A developer signs in with valid credentials
scenarios.then: The developer dashboard renders with at least one project card

scenarios.name: Match card shows score and explanation
scenarios.maps_to_requirement: Developer dashboard renders match score and explanation
steps: On the developer dashboard, read the first card's [data-testid=match-score]
Assert the score is rendered as a percentage
scenarios.given: The developer dashboard is loaded with recommendations
scenarios.then: match-score and match-explanation are visible and populated

scenarios.name: Manager dashboard shows risk badges without raw vectors
scenarios.maps_to_requirement: Manager dashboard exposes risk badges, never raw behavioral vectors
steps: Sign in as a manager and select a team
Assert no raw work_style / motivation vectors appear in the DOM
scenarios.given: A manager is signed in and a team is selected
scenarios.when: The manager dashboard renders the team risk summary
scenarios.then: Per-developer risk badges show, and no raw behavioral data is leaked

summary.coverage_note: Covers login routing, developer match cards, feedback flow, and manager risk-summary privacy.
